Setlist
Songs Played in the Acoustic Set 2014 - 2015
For the 2014 - 2015 Summer Tours, DMB experimented with two-set shows that started earlier and stopped having traditional openers. Personnel would vary from song-to-song and set-to-set. This is a look at how the songs that were played "acoustic" in the first set.

It stands out that most of the songs were played either in one set or the other compartmentalizing the setlists, especially in 2015.
Song Set 1 Debut 2014 Set 1 2014 Set 2 + E 2015 Set 1 2015 Set 2 + E Total Set 1 Total Set 2 % Set 1 Notes 
Bartender05.16.14150130280100.00%only played Dave & Tim
Stay or Leave05.16.1460140200100.00%Dave & Tim played this once on 7.26.14, Carter or Stefan on all others
Take Me to Tomorrow05.16.149080170100.00%mostly played Dave solo; all seven band members played on 5.31.14
Satellite05.16.14129155271465.85%first song to then be played in set 2 (5.17.14)
Stolen Away on 55th & 3rd05.16.1424000240100.00%this performance liberated Stolen Away after 2085 days (last played 8.30.08)
Tripping Billies05.16.1414221135392.11%only 4 known acoustic versions began with "Nature" intro (a few missing tapes from 2015)
#2705.16.141030010376.92%not played at all on 2015 Summer Tour
Minarets05.16.1481201883021.05%only played once acoustic after 6.28.14
Sugar Man05.16.1414000140100.00%was not played after 2014 until 6.21.22
Two Step05.16.1425115540686.96%
Recently05.17.14170130300100.00%only song played with 5 different personnel combinations over both years
Grace Is Gone05.17.14716013192.86%
Lie in Our Graves05.17.14112113121544.44%
Crash into Me05.17.14852210758.825
So Damn Lucky05.17.14150140290100.00%
Ants Marching05.17.14203813281663.64%
Sweet05.21.1413040170100.00%Carter and Dave this performance only, all others full band
Funny the Way It Is05.21.142414016480.00%
Dancing Nancies05.21.142421541917.39%this performance full band, other acoustic are Dave & Tim
What Would You Say05.21.1425222547787.04%most played song of the tours combined; Jeff changed to the flute with this performance
Save Me05.23.141241102345.56%
Pay for What You Get05.24.14504090100.00%not played again full band after 2015 until 7.9.22
I'll Back You Up05.24.1410030130100.00%
Stay (Wasting Time)05.24.14290821710.53%all electric versions feature the Lovely Ladies
A Whiter Shade of Pale05.30.14106070100.00%only played Dave solo
Oh06.06.1440200240100.00%mostly Dave & Tim, Carter played on some versions
Snow Outside06.07.14190150340100.00%6.27.14 performance was Bela Fleck's return after 6 years
Good Good Time06.13.1418001811.11%this performance liberated Good Good Time after 1414 days (last played 7.30.10)
Slip Slidin' Away06.14.14600060100.00%these are the only six performances after the initial Dave + Paul Simon
Beach Ball06.20.142080100100.00%only played Dave solo
Rye Whiskey06.21.1410140150100.00%this performance is the only time Rye Whiskey has closed a set
Little Red Bird06.25.1440180220100.00%Carter played with Dave on 6.28.14, all others are Dave solo
Crush06.25.142201213416.82%all 3 acoustic versions were Dave & Tim
Typical Situation06.25.144116320483.33%
Christmas Song06.28.14100010100.00%the only known June performance of Christmas Song since 6.24.93
Rhyme & Reason07.02.14812110283.33%after this performance Dave credits Stefan with a "good call" to play it
Sister07.05.14261831417.65%
Loving Wings07.19.14402060100.00%
Old Dirt Hill (Bring That Beat Back)07.26.1450110160100.00%
